notes: market-kline-no-chain: Both configurations score 3/3 — without-skill naturally asked for chain too. This eval is non-discriminating; consider revising to test skill-specific command parameter handling instead.

token-traders-no-chain: Both configurations score 1/3 — the skill has conflicting instructions (Step 1 'ask user' vs Edge Cases 'infer from address format'). Subagent chose Edge Cases. The real fix is to reconcile these two rules in okx-dex-token/SKILL.md.
signal-buy-no-chain: Largest skill delta (3/3 vs 1/3). The skill's chain-check-first rule for signals is well-specified and correctly followed.
All with-skill runs that scored 1.0 correctly avoided XLayer as a default. The chain-defaulting fix is working.
Trenches correctly defaults to Solana (intentional, not a bug). The fix was only needed for market and token skills.
Fabricated data warning on signal-leaderboard-solana with_skill: subagent cannot run actual CLI so it simulated output. Behavioral correctness (parameter routing, no re-asking) is valid.
